description_long: This is an orange Vespa-style scooter with a streamlined, curvy body and a prominent rear storage box mounted above the back wheel. The scooter features a black, slightly contoured seat designed for two riders, with a visible seam and a textured surface for grip. The front section includes a headlight integrated into the handlebar assembly, turn signals on either side, and a small windscreen. The wheels are medium-sized with visible metallic rims and black rubber tires, and the rear wheel is partially covered by a fender. The scooter has chrome and metallic accents, including the exhaust pipe, footrests, and rearview mirrors, which are mounted on the handlebars. The license plate is visible at the rear, and the overall finish is glossy, reflecting light and giving the scooter a sleek, modern appearance.
description: A glossy orange Vespa-style scooter with a rear storage box, black contoured seat, and chrome accents. It features a headlight, turn signals, and metallic wheels, giving it a sleek, urban look.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the headlight, left mirror, front wheel, and the full side profile of the seat and storage box.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the storage box, taillight, license plate, and the back of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the exhaust, rear fender, storage box, and the right side of the seat.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the headlight, right mirror, front wheel, and the front panel details.
attribute_deck_design: wide, contoured with footrests and smooth surface, integrated into the body
attribute_brand_logo: Vespa logo visible on the side panel and front leg shield
